source: GitHub Actions CI perf-budgets job — main branch
rationale: Budget raised to 800KB: growth from 319KB to 752KB is from self-hosting Inter (variable, ~100KB) and JetBrains Mono (400+500 weights, ~200KB) via @fontsource. Previously loaded from Google Fonts CDN (not counted in client bytes). Self-hosting eliminates external dependency and ad-blocker interference.
